title: Pineapple Bun Bo Lo Bao

seo.title: Authentic Pineapple Bun Recipe (Bo Lo Bao) at Home
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best authentic Chinese Pineapple Buns (Bo Lo Bao) at home with our easy step-by-step recipe. Get perfect crispy tops and soft fluffy buns every time!
longTailKeywords: homemade pineapple bun bo lo bao
seo.h1: Authentic Pineapple Bun (Bo Lo Bao) Recipe
h2Headings: What is Pineapple Bun (Bo Lo Bao)?
Step-by-Step Guide to Making Bo Lo Bao
Tips for the Best Crispy Topping
seo.imageAlt: A freshly baked authentic Chinese Pineapple Bun (Bo Lo Bao) with its signature crispy, sugary topping and soft bread.
seo.imageCaption: Bake your own delicious Pineapple Buns (Bo Lo Bao) at home with this easy-to-follow recipe, featuring a golden, crackled crust.

description: Experience the iconic Hong Kong Pineapple Bun, known for its irresistibly crunchy, sugary crust that gives way to a soft, fluffy bread underneath. Despite its name, this beloved pastry contains no pineapple, but rather gets its moniker from the crackled, golden appearance of its topping, resembling a pineapple's skin. Enjoy making these delightful Bo Lo Bao at home, perfect for breakfast or a sweet snack.

instructions.title: Prepare the Dough
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine bread flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. Add lukewarm milk and beaten egg. Mix until a shaggy dough forms. Turn out onto a clean surface and knead for 10-12 minutes until smooth and elastic. Incorporate the softened butter and knead for another 5-7 minutes until the dough passes the windowpane test.

instructions.title: First Proofing
instructions.text: Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 60-90 minutes, or until doubled in size. This crucial step allows the yeast to activate fully, resulting in a soft, airy bun.

instructions.title: Make the Pineapple Topping
instructions.text: While the dough is proofing, prepare the topping. In a bowl, cream together the cold cubed butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in the egg yolk and evaporated milk until just combined. Gradually add the all-purpose flour and mix until a soft, crumbly dough forms. Do not overmix. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.

instructions.title: Shape the Buns and Apply Topping
instructions.text: Once the dough has doubled, gently punch it down and divide it into 8 equal portions. Roll each portion into a smooth ball. Take the chilled topping dough and divide it into 8 equal portions. Flatten each topping portion into a disc large enough to cover the top of a bun. Carefully place a topping disc over each bread bun, gently pressing to adhere and smooth the edges.

instructions.title: Second Proofing and Scoring
instructions.text: Arrange the topped buns on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving space between them. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and let them proof again in a warm place for 30-45 minutes, or until visibly puffy. Just before baking, gently brush the topping with a thin layer of beaten egg wash. Use a sharp knife to lightly score a criss-cross pattern on the topping of each bun.

instructions.title: Bake the Pineapple Buns
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 180C (350F). Bake the buns for 15-20 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and crackled, and the buns are cooked through. The signature pineapple pattern should be prominent. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly on a wire rack before serving. Enjoy them warm!

tips: Ensure your butter for the topping is well chilled. This helps create that signature crumbly, crackled crust when baked.
Do not over-knead the topping mixture; it should remain somewhat crumbly, not smooth, to achieve the best pineapple-like texture.
For an extra shiny and golden crust, brush the topping with a thin layer of egg wash (beaten whole egg) just before baking. Serve warm for the best experience.
article: Pineapple Bun Bo Lo Bao is a beloved Chinese Baking dish enjoyed across Chinese. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
